message.content:
@startuml
actor "actorName" as Actor1
participant CLI
participant Web
package Manage-Pipeline {
  participant caade
}

Actor1 -> CLI : caade-pipeline-destroy()
CLI -> caade : pipeline/destroy()

activate CLI
activate caade
deactivate CLI
deactivate caade

actor "actorName" as Actor2
Actor2 -> Web : pipeline/destroy()
Web -> caade : pipeline/destroy()

@enduml
